docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF EVANS, ALONZO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,300.01 FILED BY EVANS, ALONZO AS TO DEFENDANT MEN, REM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
AMENDED AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,538.15 FILED BY EVANS, ALONZO AS TO DEFENDANT MEN, REM
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 SERVED AUG-31-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MEN, REM
DECLARATION OF REM MEN RE: AMENDING CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF EVANS, ALONZO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-02-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-02-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ALONZO EVANS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REM MEN IS PRESENT. MR. REM IS ASSISTED BY HIS DAUGHER MARINA SOLOVEY WITH RUSSIAN INTERPRETATION. MS. SOLOVEY WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETERS OATH. THE DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF THE AMENDED CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2017 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EVANS, ALONZO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEN, REM $3,979.75 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,979.75 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT MEN, REM
